steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says that positive charges above 200 pC can draw pollen to a pollinator, which is the basis for the team’s conclusion.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
The matching choice states that both bumblebees and European peacock butterflies have maximum charges greater than 200 pC, which supplies the data needed to show the attraction condition.
The other three either involve houseflies, compare charges, or claim a charge below 200 pC, none of which demonstrate that both pollinators exceed the threshold.
A is correct.
